error_signature: JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON parameter in HTTP request
symptom: When making an HTTP POST request, n8n throws an error stating that the JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON.
applies_when: Using dynamic JSON data in the request body
not_this_if: Static JSON data is used without dynamic variables
root_cause: The error occurs because the JSON structure is not valid. Specifically, the prompt field is incorrectly formatted, leading to an invalid JSON object being sent in the request.
fix_steps: Replace the prompt value with '"prompt": {{ JSON.stringify($json.output) }}'
Ensure all other JSON fields are correctly formatted
agent_instruction: Update the prompt field to use JSON.stringify for valid JSON formatting.
